headline: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does CenterPoint (CNP) have what it takes? Let's find out.

raw.headline: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?

headline: Ice Cube to Take Big3 League Public at $290 Million Valuation
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Big3, the 3-on-3 basketball league founded by Ice Cube and Jeff Kwatinetz, has entered into an agreement with a special purpose acquisition company to take the organization public.
